name: Poppy Seed Oatmeal Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all-purpose and whole wheat flours, oatmeal, baking powder, salt, and poppy seeds.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together buttermilk, honey, and egg.
3. Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients; mix quickly, just until combined.
4. Pour the batter into a greased 8 x 4 inch (1.5L) loaf pan.
5. Brush the top of the batter with melted butter.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (180°C) for 45 to 50 minutes, or until a cake tester inserted in the centre of the loaf comes out clean.
7. Allow the bread to cool for 5 minutes in the pan.
8. Turn the bread onto a wire rack.
